_notes: A scheme = ordered gates, each pointing at a registered IMetricProvider plus an
operator/threshold (and, for points-based schemes, a step function + aggregation).
The SchemeEvaluator never names a scheme. Adding BREEAM / Green Star later = a new
scheme block + reuse of the existing providers — zero engine changes.
Per-project override merged by id from <project>/_BIM_COORD/sustainability/green_schemes.json.
delegated:'EDGE_APP' marks a gate whose authoritative number comes from the EDGE app —
the dashboard shows STING-indicative + an entry field for the official value.
Sources: EDGE Methodology Report (edgebuildings.com); USGBC LEED v5 (usgbc.org/leed/v5).

schemes.name: IFC/World Bank EDGE
schemes._zeroCarbonNote: SUS-7 — ZeroCarbon carries a distinct op_carbon gate (net-zero operational carbon, >=100% of operational electricity met by on-site renewables, indicative) so it is no longer a rank-tie with Advanced (both were energy 40/water 20/materials 20). Certified/Advanced set op_carbon 0 so they are never blocked by it; ZeroCarbon's 100 also ranks it above Advanced.
